title: Spanish authorities block Polymarket and Kalshi over gambling laws
summary: Spain joined a growing list of national authorities restricting or banning prediction market platforms amid concerns over unlicensed gambling activities.

title: Bitcoin 'liquidation hunts' control BTC at $77K amid new Iran peace deal doubts
summary: Bitcoin failed to copy US stocks' upside after a spike to $78,000 became one of a series of liquidity grabs.

title: Rocket, Satellite Stocks Surge as SpaceX IPO Fuels Euphoria
summary: Space and satellite-related stocks soared Tuesday as investor enthusiasm around the industry intensified after Elon Musk’s SpaceX filed for a public offering last week.

title: Altman-Backed Oklo Rises on US Nuclear Reactor Fuel Program
summary: Oklo Inc. shares jumped after the the Sam Altman-backed reactor technology company said it’s in talks to participate in a US Department of Energy program to supply nuclear fuel, an effort aimed at relieving potential bottlenecks that threaten to slow the deployment of fission power.
